{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032400152005F7918DBEAEF8D474B1"}"},"total":253},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7533822540249826110","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"内容很棒，超喜欢的，很温馨"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1754111276,"group_id":"7510025505823804478","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1w7VK0NQR7sqHZ1PmHm0kjNfDfchY0shB85+NYovKd7","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776877005&x-signature=F7rwZ9C6HX8CXHTnqUkNbe1L%2B0Q%3D","user_id":"1974372325398013","user_name":"爱吃多拼炒饭的顾幽一"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1974372325398013","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7510025505823804478","book_info":{"abstract":"【宝可梦】【神奇宝贝】【宠物小精灵】【日常】【农场主】【无CP】【培育家】
在神秘而又繁茂的森林中，有着轻捷敏健的绿色身影在树枝间跳跃，快如闪电的红色身影藏匿其中，振翅飞翔的迅猛身影盘旋翱翔······
宛如绿色地毯的广袤草坪上，绚丽优美的蝶影在翩翩起舞，可爱呆萌的含羞苞悠闲自得；体型如山般的绿色巨兽睡得正香······
静谧而又深邃的湖泊中，身形修长的魅影潜藏其中，体型健硕的蓝色身影立于湖边······
······
这是位于丰缘地区绿荫镇的长青农场，在黎淮继承农场后，其凭借意外获取的培育知识，将手中精灵一步步送上巅峰的同时，更是将农场一步步发展壮大。
（注：本书时间线早于动漫主角，除精灵道具外，作者还会添加部分私设；且本书偏日常，适当添加对战场面，不喜勿入，谢谢。）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/aaa2d6250869aad0f277bac69893f73c","author":"司风墨白","author_id":"","book_id":"7510025505823804478","book_name":"精灵：开局我继承丰缘农场","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0d8c0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":74,"name":"宠物","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=74&name=宠物&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7510025737949151806","read_count":"25164","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1966599"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.5","serial_count":"871","tags":"动漫衍生,二次元,宠物,无女主,开局,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2ob86a6e86345aa0f3d2065885064114bd~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779466520&x-signature=kPBESiznwzR5wrn37z0Occow%2FR4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2189861615322013","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"279"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032400152005F7918DBEAEF8D474B1"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"s
